channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: US, UK Outline Recommendations to Align Stablecoin and Tokenization Rules
item.description: The joint recommendations back cross-border stablecoins and tokenized markets, setting a shared direction while avoiding binding rules.

item.title: Cathie Wood’s ARK buys another 220K Circle shares despite sell-off
item.description: Cathie Wood’s ARK Invest added $13.9 million worth of Circle shares on Tuesday, extending its July buying spree to 725,517 shares amid a steep stock decline.

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin, ether ETFs draw inflows as majors rise as much as 5%
item.description: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs took in about $181 million on Tuesday, a day after shedding roughly $425 million, per SoSoValue data. Ether ETFs added about $58 million.

item.title: Stripe, Advent offer $53B to acquire PayPal: Report
item.description: Stripe and Advent reportedly offered to buy PayPal for $53 billion, at a 28% premium compared to the company’s Tuesday closing price.

item.title: UK plans first G7 digital sovereign bond by early 2027
item.description: The security will launch on HSBC’s Orion platform within the BoE and FCA’s Digital Securities Sandbox to test reduced settlement times and costs.

item.title: Visa, Mastercard and Ripple back x402 as agent payments average 32 cents
item.description: Forty companies now govern x402, the protocol Coinbase built and handed away. It settled about $24 million last month across 75 million payments.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Kalshi says CFTC, Michigan orders leave it in ‘impossible position’
item.description: “We are disappointed by this decision and believe it is unfair to Kalshi,” the company’s legal counsel said on X.

item.title: Bitcoin nears $65,000 as cooling U.S. inflation guts the Fed rate-hike trade
item.description: The June CPI print pulled hike odds from 43% to 13%, with analysts now watching the September FOMC meeting for further cues on positioning.

item.title: US freezes $131M in Iran-linked crypto as Middle East tensions rise
item.description: “US Treasury is committed to disrupting and degrading Iran’s illicit financial activities, including its abuse of digital assets,” US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said Tuesday.

item.title: Sentiment negative, but you all bought Bitcoin today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1zdFJ5VUJVLVVwVnFqYXhySlJBNVk2VGpMdUVsX2RVYWoybV8xM2d0dEhVT0NaeUFMVW1BTUp5M25lVzNYRm9pam9VQTdza1lBS2VFaDNzWlpyMWJSSmNrR09vQi1ZNGs?oc=5" target="_blank">Sentiment negative, but you…

item.title: Bitmine generated $46M from Ethereum staking last quarter
item.description: Ethereum staking generated 98% of Bitmine’s revenue last quarter as the company’s pivot from Bitcoin mining gained momentum following its March validator launch.

item.title: Over 95% of Coinbase’s code is now written with help of AI
item.description: Coinbase’s Rob Witoff said the company is leaning more on AI to help with execution, but still needs high-agency humans for judgment and strategy.

item.title: JUST IN: $65,000 Bitcoin - x.com
item.description: JUST IN: $65,000 Bitcoin

item.title: Three US senators oppose CLARITY Act on ethics grounds with vote expected soon
item.description: Senate Majority Leader John Thune reportedly said the chamber will consider a vote on the crypto market structure bill before Aug. 10, though it’s unclear whether it has enough Democratic support to pass.

item.title: U.S. CFTC moves to stop Kalshi from canceling trades as ordered by Michigan court
item.description: The federal derivatives regulator, which oversees trading at Kalshi, argued it was inappropriate for Michigan to "bully" the firm into reversing trades.

item.title: Our goal is clear: return $STRC to par. - x.com
item.description: Our goal is clear: return $STRC to par.…

item.title: Top traders on Hyperliquid are aggressively long bitcoin:native , showing some of the highest sustained long positioning we’ve recorded. This exposure exceeds what was seen during the last run to around $83k, pointing to strong speculative demand at these - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTFBpQWJwWWJzd25fdE96S0VIS1NFOGRPWlluVkRRd0tOV1hVZ0c5RVdVRVBVS1lLWllSd3cxbE1ubkdMeENUSG15VWpvWm1CMnVKUGJ4dW5VY3dEMlFVTHk0?oc=5" target="_blank">Top traders on Hyperliquid are aggress…

item.title: Velocity raises $38M to build stablecoin treasury infrastructure for enterprises
item.description: Backed by Dragonfly, FirstMark and Coinbase Ventures, the startup is expanding software that helps businesses integrate stablecoins into treasury and payment workflows.

item.title: DeepMind CEO Says AGI Will Be Bigger Than Electricity or Fire
item.description: Demis Hassabis says artificial general intelligence is only a few years away and proposes a new U.S. standards body to test frontier AI models before release.

item.title: US, UK treasuries to align transatlantic rules on tokenization and stablecoins
item.description: The two governments issued recommendations on the treatment of digital assets as the US prepares to implement a 2025 law on payment stablecoins.

item.title: Some U.S. Senate Democrats come out against Clarity Act, calling it a 'corrupt' bill
item.description: Certain Democrats are taking an increasingly rigorous stand against the crypto market structure bill, which needs a significant number from their party to pass.

item.title: NEW BITCOIN DOCUMENTARY PREMIERES JULY 18 Hummingbird: The Bitcoin Jungle Story explores the rise of Bitcoin Jungle in Uvita, 🇨🇷 Costa Rica, tracing the origins of its organic farmers market and Bitcoin community. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE16Q1hCZTl5c0E4bTRNdFUya1A3ajItdERpUmpRSUllWXZzaWpqTjJRdy1EWThROS1ZMm1XOVVvc2lsVDFSTGFXVUt1ejF6OW9YcjlJTXVRWnpOSkxUcUJYOUN1cE9WZw?oc=5" target="_blank">NEW BITCOIN DOCUMENTARY PREM…

item.title: Binance bets on becoming a crypto 'super app' as stablecoins reshape growth
item.description: Shunyet Jan, Binance’s head of spot trading and derivatives, said the exchange is focusing more on payments and financial services than on trading alone as it drives the next phase of its expansion.

item.title: The Clarity Act isn't a ticket to sanctions evasion, actually
item.description: The bill, as currently drafted, has the power to stop sanctions evasion at scale, argues Ari Redbord, global head of policy at TRM Labs.

item.title: UK government defers capital gains on certain crypto with ‘no gain, no loss’ approach
item.description: The change in tax policy, expected to affect about 700,000 people in the UK, is tied to the disposal of crypto in lending and liquidity pools.

item.title: JCB signs Circle MOU to test stablecoin payments in Japan
item.description: The companies will explore using USDC for JCB’s cross-border treasury operations and merchant payments in Japan as regulated stablecoin adoption gains momentum.

item.title: Mizuho downgrades Circle to underperform, cuts price target to $50 on Open USD threat
item.description: The Japanese investment bank said Open USD's yield pass-through model could pressure Circle's margins by shifting more reserve income to distributors.

item.title: Wikipedia blackout could hurt how AI engines like ChatGPT understand crypto
item.description: Wikipedia observes guidelines on crypto coverage that date back many years and may now be outdated, according to the report.

item.title: U.S., UK move to align rules for tokenized finance across world's largest financial markets
item.description: The joint roadmap aims to reduce regulatory friction for tokenized assets while strengthening ties between the world's two largest financial centers.

item.title: CleanSpark shares jump 22% after $6.6B Georgia data center lease
item.description: The Bitcoin miner’s Georgia agreement with an undisclosed investment-grade technology company expands its footprint in AI and high-performance computing infrastructure.

item.title: I loved Brian Armstrong from the moment he walked into my office, but I had already invested in CoinLab, so I didn’t invest at first. But my son, Adam did. I decided Coinbase would have too long a road to success, so I passed. Ouch. I thought retail crypto was to - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9IcmNSRmNiZThzQ3BGTnh4Y2k0UFp4WGV2NmxuaTQ4aXZCTS1CVTYxR3RJbDR3TUMtNVBNXzBxVmdpUm9Eblg0UmVZTWh4b1p1S2t3V0lKcy1ZWERHMkZV?oc=5" target="_blank">I loved Brian Armstrong from the momen…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate has 24 days to pass the Crypto Clarity Act before leaving for summer recess. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE4wMEZhbGhualBPNEFmd2JFSDdjY3NLQmVLSmMzOFBSVHpqQmsyNkhCa09xODhZZjVRWFpxem9SaXphcUhCUmZBcWg3aS01VDRuYkpEUWdRRlQ4QkNnRm1HTEJB?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senate has 24 days t…

item.title: Bitcoin Ticks Up to $64K Following Largest Inflation Slowdown in Six Years
item.description: Consumer prices cooled more than expected in June, yet geopolitical tensions continue to cast a shadow over crypto prices

item.title: “Stern,” Likely Most Prolific Ransomware Operator Ever, Sanctioned by EU as Action Targets Billions in Ransomware Damage
item.description: Summary The United States, United Kingdom, and European Union announced sanctions targeting nation-state hackers, cybercriminals, and their enablers in one… The post “Stern,” Likely Most Prolific Ransomware Operator Ever, Sanctioned by EU …

item.title: UK to Defer Capital Gains Tax on DeFi Lending, Liquidity Pool Deposits
item.description: Moving crypto into a lending protocol or liquidity pool won’t count as a taxable disposal, deferring the charge until a real cash-out.

item.title: Anchorage Digital expands Tron support with institutional TRX staking
item.description: Institutions can now stake Tron's native token directly from Anchorage's custody platform as the company expands support for one of the largest USDT settlement networks.

item.title: JPMorgan says Hyperliquid's rise threatens Circle's USDC economics
item.description: Hyperliquid's deal with Circle and Coinbase creates a "prisoner's dilemma" that puts pressure on earnings from the dollar-pegged stablecoin.

item.title: Bitcoin jumps on lowest US CPI since 2020 as traders stay wary of $64K failure
item.description: BTC price action returned to $64,000 on low US CPI inflation, but traders remained wary of rejection at key resistance.

item.title: Just In: Coinbase Opens Registration to Users in China On July 14, multiple social media users reported that Coinbase had opened account registration to users in China. Wu Blockchain confirmed the change with Coinbase staff, who said users can now comp - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1zZVR5YWRzclBQMnZRWHVZdTRXZ2lxZ0FYWEdCcnZjVHRXY2ZCVkNKSmdReV81U3I2ZFZQdmNUQ0w3Z2FPc0M4Y1VVakJ1emJCRmtCUDRKYW9HeWstMmw0RHBXaw?oc=5" target="_blank">Just In: Coinbase Opens Registra…

item.title: Ethereum Foundation spinout EthSystems targets banks with blockchain privacy technology
item.description: The spinout comes amid one of the biggest organizational shakeups at the Ethereum Foundation in years.

item.title: For pension funds, tokenization’s real play is balance-sheet management, Fidelity’s Lai says
item.description: Fidelity International’s Giselle Lai argues that the most compelling long-term use case for tokenized funds is balance-sheet management for large, global institutions, not 24/7 liquidity.

item.title: Chainalysis Supports Stable with Automatic Token Support
item.description: Chainalysis is excited to announce support for Stable, a Layer 1 blockchain optimized for stablecoin payments and aligned with the… The post Chainalysis Supports Stable with Automatic Token Support appeared first on Chainalysis .

item.title: OpenAI quietly adds Kalshi World Cup odds to ChatGPT: Report
item.description: OpenAI’s ChatGPT now displays Kalshi’s World Cup prediction market odds in search results, marking the AI firm’s first reported deal with a prediction market platform.

item.title: Strategy became a symbol of the dot-com crash: Could history repeat?
item.description: MicroStrategy blew up during the dot-com era, before Michael Saylor transformed it into the world's largest corporate Bitcoin holder. Did he learn his lesson?

item.title: Bitmine is the lead investor in the launch of @eth_systems alongside @Sharplink @ethereumJoseph EthSystems is a for-profit company building confidential and private systems for institutions. Wall Street is building rails on Ethereum and EthSystems will be a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE1zOU9xV0t4cXFoWTJHU21jVGxMNWpfTHJEUlVTclBfZE02VncybGRYWUFKaEJQSVFHOFlLVDdFa25UWVJmQWdXejhKdnpnNUFqOXFaN2p2STkwd1U?oc=5" target="_blank">Bitmine is the lead investor in the launch …

item.title: Humanity Protocol to prioritize operational security following $36M hack
item.description: Humanity Protocol’s founder said they will refocus on operational security, as malicious actors are switching from smart contract vulnerabilities to exploiting human behavior.

item.title: Hut 8 price target hiked to $165 at Benchmark as AI pivot reshapes valuation
item.description: Mark Palmer said Hut 8's Beacon Point project transforms the company into an AI infrastructure platform with a long growth runway.

item.title: U.S. June CPI fell 0.4%, likely cooling move toward Fed rate hikes
item.description: This morning's report could go a long way toward determining whether the Federal Reserve raises interest rates at its late-July meeting.

item.title: Morning Minute: Saylor's Strategy Hoards Cash, Doesn't Buy BTC
item.description: Strategy’s Bitcoin-buying machine stayed in neutral, while BTC and crypto majors chop and oil spikes ahead of a key CPI print this morning.

item.title: ECB picks firms including Deutsche Bank, Revolut for digital euro pilot
item.description: The pilot will test a beta version of the digital euro for online, offline, in-store, and e-commerce payments with ECB and central bank staff as users.

item.title: Japan’s biggest card network taps Circle to bring stablecoins to 40 million merchants
item.description: JCB and Circle will explore using USDC for cross-border payments and merchant transactions as Japan ramps up efforts to bring stablecoins into everyday commerce.

item.title: ABA, state banking groups push back on CLARITY Act stablecoin yield provisions
item.description: ABA and state banking associations published a joint letter calling for more detail on the CLARITY Act’s stablecoin yield provisions, ahead of the bill’s House hearing on Friday.

item.title: Solana community lead enters UK by-election with onchain transparency pitch
item.description: Superteam UK lead Stephen “Cap” Newnham is taking on Nigel Farage in the Clacton by-election with pledges on pension reform and onchain transparency.

item.title: U.S.-Iran escalation weighs on bitcoin, stocks as oil climbs
item.description: Your day-ahead look for July 14, 2026

item.title: US Government Moves $288M in Seized Crypto to Coinbase Prime
item.description: The seized coins landed at the government's custodian, which stops short of a sale but has revived questions about Trump's no-sell pledge.

item.title: Bitcoin's BIP-110 sparked a fight over who gets to decide the future of Bitcoin
item.description: BIP-110 sought to limit non-financial data on Bitcoin's blockchain but instead reignited debates over censorship and decentralization.

item.title: Me explaining crypto for 17th time - x.com
item.description: Me explaining crypto for 17th time

item.title: 🚨SCOOP: Top White House Crypto Adviser to Take Military Leave as Clarity Act Enters Critical Stretch Crypto Council Executive Director @patrickjwitt will embark on a months-long leave later this month to begin Army National Guard JAG training. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE4waHVMUkd2X3JHbVpwblNVUXNUSW5XR3FyTnZSa1RqT1dhU2RQeHpibnJyRnlSdEllOTlkU2FVdC1hZGx3ZXUtbjRUNlVicDFtQzRfNGhWRFBUc0hrclJMR0I5bjVCQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨SCOOP: Top White House Cry…

item.title: Binance Releases 44th Proof of Reserves Report Binance, the world’s largest crypto exchange by user count and trading volume, released its 44th Proof of Reserves report with a July 1 snapshot. User BTC holdings rose 1.22% from June 1 to about 640,000 B - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9NSHBOUVFmMGNzR2UyRmJLQTlobkF0ODFhSTJYcVdWUkJsTmZVekU2YTR6dlRkb1NLZ1oyTkRHSVNGSzdJdUlnOUdWd2hrOEZDNDk2WExCU1RvR0ttbW40aHMyVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Binance Releases 44th Proof of R…
